headline: Higher NII & Loan Growth to Aid M&T Bank's Q2 Earnings Amid Cost Woes
summary: MTB's Q2 results, set to release on July 15, are expected to benefit from higher NII and loan growth, while elevated costs remain a concern.

headline: PNC Financial's Q2 Earnings Coming Up: Here's What You Should Know
summary: PNC's Q2 results, scheduled to report on July 15, are expected to reflect higher revenues and earnings, supported by NII growth and FirstBank integration.

headline: Why M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does M&T Bank (MTB) have what it takes? Let's find out.
